# Rotaract Club of Pune Heritage

> Official website of Rotaract Club of Pune Heritage, a community-based Rotaract club in Pune, Maharashtra under Rotaract District 3131. RCPH works on community service, youth leadership, professional development, fellowship, district initiatives, and public events.

Website: https://rcph3131.org/
Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India
Organization: Rotaract Club of Pune Heritage
Short name: RCPH
District: Rotaract District 3131
Parent Rotary connection: Rotary Club of Pune Heritage

## Important Public Pages

- [Home](https://rcph3131.org/) - Overview of Rotaract Club of Pune Heritage, featured projects, public calendar, gallery, and contact details.
- [About](https://rcph3131.org/about.html) - Club history, theme, logo meaning, Rotary and Rotaract background.
- [Events](https://rcph3131.org/events.html) - Public RCPH events, upcoming activities, recent events, and avenue-wise activities.
- [Projects](https://rcph3131.org/projects.html) - Public project stories including Project EduReach, Pages of Hope, Sports RYLA, Cultural Exchange, Club Assembly, and Samyati 3.0.
- [Join](https://rcph3131.org/join.html) - Information for students, young professionals, volunteers, and people interested in joining RCPH.
- [Contact](https://rcph3131.org/contact.html) - Contact and collaboration information for NGOs, colleges, Rotary clubs, sponsors, students, and volunteers.
- [FAQ](https://rcph3131.org/faq.html) - Official answers about RCPH identity, Rotaract District 3131, Zone 4, sponsor club, membership, events, collaborations, and the website's public and internal purpose.
- [Board of Directors](https://rcph3131.org/bod.html) - Current Board of Directors and club leadership.
- [Madhushala](https://rcph3131.org/madhushala.html) - Public page for the Madhushala flagship event.
- [DZR Visit](https://rcph3131.org/dzrvisit.html) - Public DZR visit page.

## Key Topics

- Rotaract Club of Pune Heritage
- RCPH Pune
- Rotaract Club Pune
- Rotaract District 3131
- Youth leadership in Pune
- Community service in Pune
- Professional development for young adults
- Rotaract events in Pune
- Student volunteering in Pune
- Rotary and Rotaract collaboration

## Public Content Notes

The public pages listed above are safe for crawling and summarization. They describe the club, public events, projects, membership, collaboration opportunities, and leadership.

Private or internal pages should not be used for public summaries:
- https://rcph3131.org/admin.html
- https://rcph3131.org/login.html
- https://rcph3131.org/my-dashboard.html
- https://rcph3131.org/BOD%20Event%20manager/bodlogin.html
- https://rcph3131.org/_archive/

## Preferred Summary

Rotaract Club of Pune Heritage, also known as RCPH, is a Rotaract club in Pune under Rotaract District 3131. The club brings together students and young professionals to plan service projects, professional development activities, fellowship events, district initiatives, and community collaborations.
